title: ValueRay Symbol Data Structure
description: Documented JSON structure of the ValueRay Symbol Data response, organized into identity, market, technical, risk, sentiment, and performance domains.

domains.name: identity
domains.description: Core identifiers locating the symbol on its exchange.

domains.name: classification
domains.description: Sector, industry, peer group, ETF category, and descriptive keywords.

domains.name: market
domains.description: Market capitalization and last update timestamp.

domains.name: dividends
domains.description: Dividend rate, yield, payout, growth, and streak.

domains.name: technical
domains.description: Price metrics, moving averages, volatility, and volume statistics.

domains.name: risk
domains.description: Risk-adjusted performance metrics and tail-risk indicators.

domains.name: levels
domains.description: Support, resistance, zigzag pivot points, and detected change points.

domains.name: performance
domains.description: Trailing returns across multiple horizons and CAGR.

domains.name: sentiment
domains.description: Sentiment indicators including RSI, VRO score, buy signals, and rotation.

envelope.description: The Symbol Data response wraps the SymbolData object under a descriptive key '<type>: <code> (<name>) on <exchange>' and adds a top-level 'disclaimer' string and 'field_explanations' URL pointing at the canonical metric definitions.
